description_long: This bungalow features a modern, low-profile design with a flat roof and clean, rectilinear lines. The structure is composed of several interconnected rectangular volumes, with the largest section likely serving as the main living area and a smaller, offset section possibly functioning as a garage or auxiliary space. Large windows are visible along the longer facades, suggesting an emphasis on natural light and open views. The exterior is finished in a combination of light-colored walls and darker, flat roofing materials, with a spacious patio or terrace area adjacent to the main building. The layout includes a prominent open area, possibly a courtyard or pool, enhancing the sense of openness and outdoor living. The overall aesthetic is minimalist and contemporary, with a focus on horizontal planes and integration with the surrounding environment.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with clean lines, large windows, and a spacious open terrace or courtyard. The design emphasizes minimalism and horizontal geometry.
description_view_0: The main facade shows the elongated structure, large windows, and the open terrace or courtyard area adjacent to the building.
description_view_1: From this end view, the depth of the main and auxiliary volumes is visible, along with the open courtyard and the flat roof sections.
description_view_2: This side view highlights the long row of windows, the main entrance area, and the relationship between the main building and the open terrace.
description_view_3: The rear view reveals the back of the main living area, the open courtyard, and the smaller auxiliary structure, emphasizing the building's horizontal layout.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped side windows
